row.QuestionL1: Ek gaan nou vir jou prentjies wys en jy moet vir my vertel wat dit is.
row.QuestionL2: Now, I’m going to show you pictures and you must tell me what they are.
row.QuestionL3: Kwanje, ngizokutjengisa iinthombe wena uzongitjela bonyana khuyini.
row.QuestionL4: Nyalo-ke ngitakukhombisa titfombe bese wena uyasho kutsi tiyini.
row.QuestionL5: Ngoku ndiza kukubonisa imifanekiso kwaye kufuneka undixelele ukuba yimifanekiso yantoni xa ndiyikhomba.
row.QuestionL6: Manje, ngizokukhombisa izithombe bese wena uyangitshela ukuthi ziyini uma ngizikhomba.
row.QuestionL7: Jwale ke tlo o bontsha ditshwantsho, mme wena o tlameha ho mpolella hore ke ditshwantsho tsa eng.
row.QuestionL8: Ke tlo go laetša diswantšho gomme o swanetše go mpotša gore ke seswantšho sa eng ge ke se šupa.
row.QuestionL9: Jaanong ke tlile go go bontsha ditshwantsho mme o mpolelele gore ke tsa eng?
row.QuestionL10: Zwino ndi khou ya u ni sumbedza zwifanyiso, musi ndi tshi tshi sumba, inwi ni ḓo amba uri ndi mini.
row.QuestionL11: Sweswi ndzi ta ku komba swifaniso, u fanele ku ndzi byela leswaku i yini loko ndzi swi komba.

row.QuestionL1:
Ons gaan nou ‘n speletjie speel. Ek gaan vir jou ‘n paar letters wys. Sê vir my watter klank elke letter maak.

Hier is `n letter. Kan jy vir my sê watter klank dit is? 
(Die kind sê die klank.)
Dit is die klank /n/. 


Hier is `n ander letter. Kan jy vir my sê watter klank dit is? 
(Die kind sê die klank.)
Dis die klank /d/. 

Ek gaan nou vir jou ander letters wys. Sê vir my watter klank elke letter maak.

Is jy gereed? Kom ons begin.
row.QuestionL2:
I am going to show you some letters. Tell me what sound each letter makes. Here is a letter.  What sound does it make? 

It makes the sound /n/. 

Here is another letter. Can you tell me what sounds it makes?  
It makes the sound /d/. 

I will point to these letters and just as we did, you must tell me what sound each letter makes.
Are you ready? Let’s go.
row.QuestionL3:
Ngizokutjengisa amanye amaledere. Ngitjela bonyana iledere ngalinye lenza liphi itjhada/umdumo? Nali iledere. Lenza liphi itjhada/umdumo?
 

  Lenza itjhada /n/

  Nali elinye iledere. Ungangitjela bonyana lenza liphi itjhada?  

  Lenza itjhada /d/. 

  Ngizokukhomba amaledere lawa njengombana   
  senzile, ufanele ungitjele bonyana iledere ngalinye lenza muphi     
  umdumo/itjhada.
  Sewulungile? Asithome.
  Nali elinye iledere. Ungangitjela bonyana lenza liphi itjhada?  

  Lenza itjhada /d/. 

  Ngizokukhomba amaledere lawa njengombana   
  senzile, ufanele ungitjele bonyana iledere ngalinye lenza muphi     
  umdumo/itjhada.
  Sewulungile? Asithome.
row.QuestionL4:
Nalu lolunye luhlavu. Ungangitjela kutsi lwenta muphi umsindvo?     
Lwenta umsindvo /d/. 
Ngitawukhomba letinhlavu bese senta njengoba sentile ngenhla, wena utawusho kutsi tenta muphi umsindvo. 
Ngabe sewulungile na? Asicale-ke.
row.QuestionL5:
Ndiza kukubonisa oonobumba. Ndixelele ukuba sesiphi isandi esenziwa ngunobumba ngamnye. Nanku unobumba. Wenza esiphi isandi?  
Wenza isandi esithi /n/. 
Nanku omnye unobumba. Ungandixelela ukuba umele esiphi isandi?  
Umele isandi u /d/. 
Ndiza kukhomba unobumba njengoko senzile ngasentla, wena uza kuchaza ukuba wenza esiphi isandi.
row.QuestionL6:
Ngizokucela ukuba ufunde izinhlamvu. Ngicela ungitshele ukuthi yimuphi umsindo owenziwa uhlamvu ngalunye. Nalu uhlamvu. Ungangitshela ukuthi yimuphi umsindo eliwenzayo?
Umsindo eliwenzayo u /n/. 

Nalu olunye. Ungangitshela ukuthi yimuphi umsindo eliwenzayo?
  
Umsindo eliwenzayo u /d/. 

Manje sizodlala umdlalo. Mina ngizokhomba lezi zinhlamvu njengoba senzile ngenhla, wena uzongitshela ukuthi zenza muphi umsindo.

Manje ke, asenze.
row.QuestionL7:
Ke tlo o bontsha tse ding tsa ditlhaku. Mpolelle hore tlhaku e nngwe le e nngwe e etsa modumo ofe. Tlhaku ke ena. E etsa modumo ofe? 

E etsa modumo /n/. 

Tlhaku e nngwe ke ena. Na o ka mpolella hore e etsa modumo ofe?  
E etsa modumo /d/. 

Ke tla supa ditlhaku tsena jwalo ka ha re entse, o lokela ho mpolella hore tlhaku e nngwe le e nngwe e etsa modumo ofe.
Na o lokile? Ha re leke.
row.QuestionL8:
Ke tlo go laetša ditlhaka tše mmalwa. Mpotše gore tlhaka ye nngwe le ye nngwe e dira modumo ofe?
Tlhaka ye nngwe še, naa e dira modumo ofe?  

E dira modumo wa /n/.  

Tlhaka ye nngwe še. Naa o ka mpotša gore e dira modumo ofe?
E dira modumo wa /d/

Ke tla šupa ditlhaka tše gomme go swana le mathomong, o swanetše go mpotša gore tlhaka ye nngwe le ye nngwe e dira modumo ofe.

Itukiše. A re thome.
row.QuestionL9:
Ke tlile go go bontsha ditlhaka dingwe. Mpolelele   gore tlhaka nngwe le nngwe e dira modumo o feng.
E dira modumo wa/n/ 

Tlhaka e nngwe ke e. A o ka mpolelela gore e dira modumo o feng?  
    E dira modumo wa /d/.
row.QuestionL10:
Ndi khou ya u ni sumbedza maṅwe maḽeḓere . Mmbudzeni mubvumo une ipfi ḽa ita wone. Ḽi ita mubvumo u fhio?

Ḽi ita mubvumo/n/.

Ḽeḓere ḽiṅwe ngeḽi. Ni nga mmbudza uri ḽi ita mubvumo ufhio?  
Ḽi ita mubvumo  /d/. 

Zwino ri khou ya u tamba mutambo. Ndi ḓo sumba kha aya     maḽeḓere nahone sa zwe ra ita afho nṱha, ni fanela u mmbudza uri ndi ufhio mubvumo  une ḽiṅwe  ḽa aya  maḽeḓere ḽa ita. No luga? Kha ri thome.
row.QuestionL11:
Ndzi ta ku komba maletere. Ndzi byeli mpfumawulo lowu letere rin`wana na rin`wana ri wu endlaka. 
Hi leri letere. Ri endla mpfumawulo wihi?

Ri endla mpfumawulo wa /n/. 
Hi leri letere rin`wana. Ndzi byeli mpfumawulo lowu ri wu endlaka?  

Ri endla mpfumawulo wa /d/. 
Ndzi ta komba maletere ku fana na leswi hi nga swi endla ehenhla. U fanele ku ndzi byela mimpfumawulo hinkwayo ya maletere.
A hi sungule.

row.QuestionL1:
Ek gaan nou vir jou die lettergrepe van ‘n woord klap. Die woord is voetbal. As jy dit opbreek is dit: voet…bal. 
Probeer jy nou.
Ek sal die woord sê en jy klap dit dan in lettergrepe.
row.QuestionL2:
I am going to clap the syllables of a word when I say it.
football.

Now you try.
I will say a word and you clap the syllables
row.QuestionL3:
Ngizokuwahla nangiphula iinhlavu zamagama lokha nangizitjhoko.
luma
 Kwanjesi ungazama.
 Ngizokutjho igama bese uwahla iinhlavu zalo
row.QuestionL4:
Ngitawushaya tandla ngishayele emalunga eligama ngalesikhatsi ngilisho
 ‘buka’
Nyalo ke zama nawe. 
Ngitawusho ligama bese ushaya tandla, ushayele emalunga aleligama
row.QuestionL5:
Ndiza kuqhwaba izandla xa ndibiza amalungu egama.
 inja. 
Ngoku zama.
Ndiza kubiza igama, wena uza kuqhwaba amalungu egama.
row.QuestionL6:
Ngizohlukanisa leli gama ngamalunga alo ngokushaya izandla kanje:
 ba-la = bala
Ake uzame nawe.
Ngizosho amagama bese wena uwahlukanisa ngamalunga awo.Phinda ushaye izandla ube uhlukanisa lamagama ngamalunga awo
row.QuestionL7:
Ke tlo bitsa lentswe ke ope dinoko tsa lona.
Bolo
Jwale a ko leke.
Ke tla bitsa lentswe mme wena o ope ho ya ka dinoko.
row.QuestionL8:
Ke tlo phaphathela dinoko tša lentšu ge ke le bolela.
mogale 
Bjale leka a a latelago.
Ke tlo bolela
row.QuestionL9:
Fa ke bua lefoko ke tlile go opa diatla go bontsha dinoko.lone.
Buka
Jaanong leka.
Ke tlile go bua lefoko mme o ope diatla go supa dinoko.
row.QuestionL10:
Ndi khou ya u vhanda madungo a ipfi musi ndi khou ḽi amba.: ṱhohokhulu.
Zwino lingedzani.
Ndi ḓo amba ipfi , inwi na vhanda madungo.
row.QuestionL11:
Ndzi ta phokotela mapeletwan ya rito loko ndzi ri vula.
Sweswi ringeta.
Ndzi ta vula rito Kutani wena u phokotela mapeletwana.

row.QuestionL1:
Ek gaan vir jou ‘n paar letters wys, jy moet die letter kies wat dieselde klank maak as wat ek sê.
9.1 Watter letter maak die klank /f/?
row.QuestionL2: I’m going to show you some letters, you must choose the letter that makes the same sound that I say.
row.QuestionL3:
Ngizokutjengisa amanye wamaledere, ufanele               
 ukhethe iledere elenza umdumo/itjhada elifana    
  naleli engilitjhoko.
row.QuestionL4: Ngitakukhombisa tinhlavu, kufanele ukhetse luhlavu lolwenta umsindvo lofana nalowo lengitawusho.
row.QuestionL5: Ndiza kukubonisa oonobumba, kufuneka ukhethe unobumba owenza isandi endisibizayo.
row.QuestionL6: Ngizokubonisa izinhlamvu, kufanele ukhethe uhlamvu olwenza umsindo ofanayo nengizowusho.
row.QuestionL7: Ke tlo o bontsha tse ding tsa ditlhaku, O lokela ho kgetha tlhaku e etsang modumo o tshwanang le oo ke o buang.
row.QuestionL8: Ke tlo go laetša ditlhaka tše dingwe o swanetše go kgetha tlhaka ye e dirago modumo wo ke o boletšego.
row.QuestionL9: Ke tlile go go bontsha ditlhaka dingwe, o tshwanetse go tlhopha tlhaka e e dirang modumo o o tshwanang le o ke o buang.
row.QuestionL10: I’m going to show you some letters, you must choose the letter that makes the same sound that I say.
row.QuestionL11: Ndzi ta ku komba maletere. U fanele ku hlawula letere leri endlaka mpfumawulo lowu ndzi wu vulaka.

row.QuestionL1: Ek gaan nou vir jou ‘n paar prentjies wys, jy moet die regte woordjie van die lys vir elke prentjie kies.
row.QuestionL2: I’m going to show you some pictures, you must choose the correct word from the list for each picture.
row.QuestionL3:
Ngizokutjengisa ezinye iinthombe, ufanele ukhethe   
  igama okungilo  erhelweni lesinye nesinye         
 isithombe.
row.QuestionL4: Ngitakukhombisa titfombe, kufanele ukhetse ligama lelifanele kuloluhla lwesitfombe ngasinye.
row.QuestionL5: Ndiza kukubonisa imifanekiso, kufuneka ukhethe igama elichanekileyo lomfanekiso ngamnye.
row.QuestionL6: Ngizokukhombisa izithombe, kufanele ukhethe igama elifanele elisho isithombe ngasinye kulawa owanikeziwe.
row.QuestionL7: Ke tlo o bontsha tse ding tsa ditshwantsho, o lokela ho kgetha lentswe le nepahetseng ho ya ka ditshwantsho tseo o di filweng.
row.QuestionL8: Ke tlo go laetša diswantšho tše dingwe, o swanetše go kgetha lentšu la maleba go ya ka diswantšho tše difilwego.
row.QuestionL9: Ke tlile go go bontsha ditshwantsho, o tlhophe lefoko le le nepagetseng la setshwantsho go tswa mo mafokong a netsweng.
row.QuestionL10: Ndi khou ya u ni sumbedza zwiṅwe zwifanyiso, ni tea u ṋanga ipfi ḽone kha mutevhe wa tshifanyiso tshiṅwe na tshiṅwe.
row.QuestionL11: Ndzi ta ku komba swifaniso, u fanele u hlawula rito leri nga rona ra xifaniso xin`wana na xin`wana.
